subtasks.description: Query SQL warehouse to calculate average cost per active seat by product for Q4 2024. Aggregate seat counts and costs at the product level, compute average cost per seat, and sort descending.

plan.cost_rationale: Single SQL query subtask required—no cross-source reconciliation needed, no policy evaluation, no document extraction. This is a straightforward aggregation task across a single data source (SQL warehouse). Assigned mid-tier because the query involves aggregation logic (grouping by product, calculating average cost per active seat) and filtering for Q4 2024, which requires moderate complexity SQL but is standard warehouse work without window functions or complex CTEs."

output.sql: SELECT product, SUM(amount_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(daily_active_seats), 0) AS avg_cost_per_seat FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date <= '2024-12-31' GROUP BY product ORDER BY avg_cost_per_seat DESC
